untranslatable_reason: The signal requires identification of specific non-profit trading motivations (forced liquidations, index rebalancing), counterparty order flow analysis, and loser behavior detection. These require microstructure data (order flow, counterparty type, motivation classification) and position tracking that are NOT available in the provided indicator set. The core logic depends on detecting when losers comprise >60% of directional order flow and confirming contradictory positioning for 3+ periods—both require order-level and counterparty-level data that standard OHLCV indicators cannot provide.
translation_notes: This is a sophisticated microstructure-based signal that relies on order flow decomposition and counterparty motivation classification. Attempted proxy: vol_ratio_20 (unusual volume as proxy for forced selling) crossed with negative returns (price falling despite loser selling). However, this is a severe oversimplification that misses the core insight: trading against identifiable losers whose motivations differ from profit maximization. A proper implementation requires: (1) order flow decomposition into motivation types, (2) counterparty classification, (3) notional position tracking by counterparty type, and (4) real-time loser flow quantification—none of which are expressible via standard technical indicators.
